== Notes for [[Item:Q116706|Q116706]] ==

http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/GASCONY.htm

The name of Adalric's wife is not known. Adalric & his wife had [two] children:]
*a) [JIMENO (-after [814/15]).
*b) ['''CENTULE''' (-[812]). Centule & his wife had [two] children:]
**i) [LOUP (-after 819).

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
